tasks.name: Weekly Brain Review
tasks.description: Proactive weekly analysis of the business
tasks.prompt: Run the weekly brain review for this project: (1) Read _brain/operations/metrics.html — compare key metrics to last week, flag any anomaly. (2) Check _brain/inbox/ for unprocessed signals. (3) Review active projects in _brain/index.html and check their status. (4) Review _brain/skills/ — identify any gaps based on recent sessions. (5) Generate a report with: what is going well, what is anomalous, top 3 opportunities to act on this week, 1 thing to fix. Save the report to _brain/inbox/weekly-review-YYYY-MM-DD.md. Auto-commit to git.
